message:
feat(polyfills): add missing Node.js API methods

Buffer:
- Add Buffer.of() for creating buffers from variadic args
- Add Buffer.isAscii() with fast byte loop (< 128 check)
- Add Buffer.isUtf8() with proper UTF-8 byte sequence validation

Stream:
- Add Readable.unshift() to push chunks back to buffer front
- Add Writable.setDefaultEncoding() for encoding configuration

URL:
- Add username/password/origin to url.parse() output
- Handle auth in url.format() with proper encoding
- Workaround QuickJS URL not supporting auth in URLs
